title: 像素化-城建 PLUC
description: The ultimate mod for authentic Chinese-style city roads.
body:
"Pixelated Urban Construction" is a comprehensive city-building mod that includes various blocks commonly found in real-life cities: road blocks, road markings, road signs, guardrails, traffic lights, and more.

Road Blocks: Using the vanilla "Cyan Terracotta" as the main road surface and "Yellow Terracotta" along with "Smooth Quartz Block" for markings, a series of road blocks have been created, significantly enhancing aesthetics. Additionally, in accordance with design standards, a double-block width has been adopted as the standard.

Road Markings: Using the marking blocks provided by this mod, players can freely construct various national-standard guide markings, offering strong expandability.

Road Signs: A series of signs have been designed with reference to the "JTG B01-2014" standard, allowing players to easily choose the most suitable signs for their needs.

Guardrails: Modeled after examples from cities like Changsha and Huaihua in Hunan Province, these guardrails are designed to closely resemble real-life counterparts.

For more details about this mod, please visit the MC ModWiki. It supports the Fabric version and is also compatible with the Forge version when used with "Xunya Link". The mod is released under the MIT License, and redistribution must comply with the license terms. You are welcome to join the Tencent QQ Group 605694633 for discussions. You can also report issues in the QQ group.
